name: Soldier Hauberk
description: Hauberks protect well and don't restrict mobility. On the downside, you can't make one without thousands of metal rings and lots and lots of time - obviously, all of that adds to the price.
descriptionZh: 链甲上衣防护效果良好，同时不会影响行动。不过，制作这么一件防具需要锻造成千上万个链环，而且需要花费大量时间，价格不菲也是情理之中的事情。
